title: Cobblemon QOL - Riven
description: A Quality of Life Modpack that gives you that Vanilla Cobblemon experience, just a little bit smoother.
body:
🔥 Welcome to Cobblemon QOL - Riven 🔥

Explore the magical world of Pokémon in Minecraft while staying true to the classic survival experience you know and love.

This Vanilla+ Cobblemon modpack is built for players who want Pokémon gameplay seamlessly integrated into Minecraft without tech bloat, forced progression, or overwhelming systems. Everything is designed to feel natural, familiar, and easy to jump into — whether you’re playing solo or on an SMP.

🌍 Explore, Catch & Build
Step into a living world where Cobblemon fits perfectly into vanilla terrain. Explore diverse biomes, discover Pokémon in the wild, and build your base exactly how you want — no restrictions, no gimmicks.

🐾 Catch and train Pokémon as you explore
🏕️ Classic Minecraft survival and progression
🧭 Encourages exploration, building, and long-term worlds

🚀 Vanilla+ Quality of Life
The core gameplay stays untouched, but the rough edges are smoothed out with carefully chosen quality-of-life mods and performance optimizations.

✨ Cleaner UI and better inventory management
⚙️ Performance-focused for smooth gameplay
🧰 Small conveniences that don’t change balance

No unnecessary systems. No complicated tech trees. Just Minecraft, improved.

🤝 Multiplayer & SMP Ready
Designed with multiplayer in mind, this pack is lightweight, stable, and easy to run on servers. Perfect for small communities, friends-only SMPs, or long-running survival worlds.

👥 Balanced for cooperative play
🛠️ Low-maintenance and server-friendly
📦 Easy to update and expand

🎮 Who Is This For?

Vanilla survival players

Cobblemon & Pokémon fans

SMP and multiplayer servers

Players who want simplicity and stability

If you’re looking for a relaxed, familiar Minecraft experience with Pokémon, this is the pack for you.

Choose your starter, explore the world, and play at your own pace.
